top_stories.title: Meta strikes up to $100B AMD chip deal as it chases ‘personal superintelligence’
top_stories.description: Meta is buying billions of dollars in AMD AI chips in a multiyear deal tied to a 160 million-share warrant, deepening its push to diversify beyond Nvidia and expand data center capacity.
top_stories.author: Rebecca Bellan
top_stories.content: Meta is buying billions of dollars in AMD AI chips in a multiyear deal tied to a 160 million-share warrant, deepening its push to diversify beyond Nvidia and expand data center capacity.

top_stories.title: Beyond Simple API Requests: How OpenAI’s WebSocket Mode Changes the Game for Low Latency Voice Powered AI Experiences
top_stories.description: In the world of Generative AI, latency is the ultimate killer of immersion. Until recently, building a voice-enabled AI agent felt like assembling a Rube Goldberg machine: you’d pipe audio to a Speech-to-Text (STT) model, send the transcript to a Large Language Model (LLM), and finally shuttle text to a Text-to-Speech (TTS) engine. Each hop […] The post Beyond Simple API Requests: How OpenAI’s WebSocket Mode Changes the Game for Low Latency Voice Powered AI Experiences appeared first on...
top_stories.author: Michal Sutter
top_stories.content: In the world of Generative AI, latency is the ultimate killer of immersion. top_stories.title: GeForce NOW Turns Screens Into a Gaming Machine
top_stories.description: The GeForce NOW sixth-anniversary festivities roll on this February, continuing a monthlong celebration of NVIDIA’s cloud gaming service. This week brings even more reasons to join the party, as GeForce NOW launches on a new platform with support for Amazon Fire TV devices, and eight new games to keep the streaming going strong. top_stories.title: New DruAI Agents Process Days of Forensic Reporting in Minutes
top_stories.description: Deep Analysis Agents now automate complex investigations and introduce multimodal, context-aware AI across cyber resilience workflows Druva, the leading provider of data security, today announced a breakthrough expansion of DruAI, introducing the industry’s first Deep Analysis Agents capable of automating complex, multi-day forensic and compliance investigations.
